inputs.label: Center Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Notch frequency of the band-stop filter.

inputs.label: Lower Cutoff Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Lower -3 dB cutoff frequency of the stopband.

inputs.label: Upper Cutoff Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Upper -3 dB cutoff frequency of the stopband.

inputs.label: Evaluation Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Frequency at which the filter response is evaluated.

formulas.linearGain: Math.abs(w0 * w0 - w * w) / Math.sqrt(Math.pow(w0 * w0 - w * w, 2) + Math.pow((w * w0) / qFactor, 2))
formulas.phaseShift_rad: Math.atan2(- (w * w0) / qFactor, w0 * w0 - w * w)
